statement: In every magma, Equation 1077 (`x = y * ((x * (x * y)) * z)`) implies Equation 747 (`x = y * (z * ((x * y) * w))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0018
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op x (op x y)) z))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op (op x y) w)))
